creator: kevlo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Andrew MacKenzie wrote:
 
 >Dear sirs,
 >
 >I noticed that LogMon is listed on FreeBSD's site as a new port.  I am happy 
 >that an interest is taken in LogMon, but as the author and maintainer I was 
 >somewhat confused that I have not been notified yet.  
 >
 >Seeing that I'm not familiar with the FreeBSD's port tree, please advise me
 >as to whom I should report updates, bugs, etc.  
 >
 Go to 
 http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/ports-trouble.html
 and see the section "4.5.2".
 
 - Kevin
